name: Bran Muffins (Mcdonald's)
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the first ingredients through a blender on high speed for 20 seconds.
2. Pour into a bowl and beat in the remaining ingredients at low speed of the mixer until completely mixed.
3. Cover and refrigerate for 24 hours.
4. Fill greased muffin wells almost full with batter.
5. Bake at 400°F for 20 to 25 minutes, or until cracked on top and a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Optionally, add 1 tbsp plumped raisins to each well of batter before baking.
